g.text: V1 : HS Code Resolution — Algorithm & Data Flow
Deterministic first · Ledger learns from human review · Schema-agnostic
Line items · HS code · description · value
Strip formatting · split HV vs LV per waybill
Three paths tried in order · stop at first success
Tuned LLM — trained on master Arabic
Currency · City · Company · Origin · ID type · Ref no.
Template fills required sections per declaration
Most rows resolve via green paths · Ranker / Reasoner only when needed · No safe-default overrides
